sources.claim: Guardrail scope must explicitly cover non-tool pathways such as handoffs.
Agent runtime observability should trace LLM generations, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom events.
GOVERN applies across AI risk-management processes and procedures.
Agentic systems require mitigations across planning, tools, memory, orchestration, outputs, and identity surfaces.
